name: DevelopmentCats
html:
dev@cat-machine:~
𓃠
dev@cat-machine:~/projects$▌
const dev = "DevelopmentCats";
while(true) // purr
ship("code");
css: .dc-card{width:100%;height:100%;background:#0d1117;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-family:'Courier New',Courier,monospace;box-sizing:border-box;padding:4%;cursor:pointer}.dc-card:active{animation:dc-pop 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.36,0.07,0.19,0.97) forwards}@keyframes dc-pop{0%{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;filter:brightness(1)}20%{transform:scale(1.15);opacity:1;filter:brightness(2) saturate(2)}60%{transform:scale(0.3) rotate(8deg);opacity:0.4;filter:brightness(3) saturate(3) hue-rotate(90deg)}100%{transform:scale(0);opacity:0;filter:brightness(0)}}.dc-terminal{width:100%;max-width:340px;background:#161b22;border-radius:8px;border:1px solid #30363d;box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(88,166,255,0.15),0 0 2px #58a6ff;overflow:hidden}.dc-terminal-bar{background:#21262d;padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;border-bottom:1px solid #30363d}.dc-dot{width:11px;height:11px;border-radius:50%;display:inline-block}.dc-red{background:#ff5f57}.dc-yellow{background:#febc2e}.dc-green{background:#28c840}.dc-title{color:#8b949e;font-size:clamp(9px,1.8vw,12px);margin-left:auto;margin-right:auto}.dc-body{padding:clamp(8px,3%,18px)}.dc-glyph{font-size:clamp(28px,10vw,52px);text-align:center;line-height:1;margin-bottom:clamp(4px,2%,10px);color:#f9826c;text-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(249,130,108,0.8);animation:dc-cat-bob 2.5s ease-in-out infinite alternate}@keyframes dc-cat-bob{from{transform:translateY(0)}to{transform:translateY(-5px)}}.dc-prompt{margin:clamp(4px,2%,8px) 0 clamp(2px,1%,4px) 0;font-size:clamp(9px,2vw,13px)}.dc-user{color:#58a6ff}.dc-sep{color:#8b949e}.dc-path{color:#3fb950}.dc-dollar{color:#e3b341;margin-left:4px}.dc-cursor{color:#58a6ff;animation:dc-blink-cur 1s steps(1) infinite}@keyframes dc-blink-cur{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}.dc-code{font-size:clamp(8px,1.9vw,12px);line-height:1.6;color:#c9d1d9}.dc-indent{padding-left:1.4em}.dc-kw{color:#ff7b72}.dc-var{color:#ffa657}.dc-op{color:#79c0ff}.dc-str{color:#a5d6ff}.dc-sc{color:#c9d1d9}.dc-fn{color:#d2a8ff}.dc-paren{color:#c9d1d9}.dc-bool{color:#79c0ff}.dc-comment{color:#8b949e;font-style:italic}
